channel.title: GitHub 热门日报
channel.description: 每天一份 GitHub Trending 中文精选

item.title: apache/ossie
item.description: 待翻译：Apache Ossie, industry wide specification effort to standardize how we exchange semantic metadata across analytics, AI and BI platforms, providing a vendor neutral, single source of truth for semantic data

item.title: Nutlope/hallmark
item.description: 待翻译：Anti-AI-slop design skill for Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.

item.title: OpenCut-app/OpenCut
item.description: 待翻译：The open-source CapCut alternative

item.title: PostHog/posthog
item.description: 待翻译：🦔 PostHog is the leading platform for building self-driving products. Our developer tools – AI observability, analytics, session replay, flags, experiments, error tracking, logs, and more – capture all the context agents need to diagnose problems, uncover opportunities, and ship fixes. Steer it all from Slack, web, desktop, or the MCP.

item.title: openinterpreter/openinterpreter
item.description: 待翻译：A coding agent for open models like Kimi K3

item.title: PrismML-Eng/Bonsai-demo
item.description: 待翻译：Bonsai Demo

item.title: hasaneyldrm/exercises-dataset
item.description: 待翻译：1,324-exercise fitness dataset — animation GIFs, 180×180 thumbnails, muscle-group & equipment data, and step-by-step instructions in 6 languages. The exercise data layer behind the LogPress app.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: 待翻译：100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.

item.title: lobehub/lobehub
item.description: 待翻译：🤯 LobeHub is your Chief Agent Operator, organizing your agents into 7×24 operations by hiring, scheduling, and reporting on your entire AI team.

item.title: YimMenu/YimMenuV2
item.description: 待翻译：Experimental menu for GTA 5: Enhanced

item.title: HKUDS/DeepTutor
item.description: 待翻译：DeepTutor: Lifelong Personalized Tutoring. https://deeptutor.info/.

item.title: mattpocock/skills
item.description: 待翻译：Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .claude directory.

item.title: github/copilot-sdk
item.description: 待翻译：Multi-platform SDK for integrating GitHub Copilot Agent into apps and services

item.title: ibelick/ui-skills
item.description: 待翻译：Skills for Design Engineers

item.title: Graphify-Labs/graphify
item.description: 待翻译：AI coding assistant skill (Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Cursor, Gemini CLI, and more). Turn any folder of code, SQL schemas, R scripts, shell scripts, docs, papers, images, or videos into a queryable knowledge graph. App code + database schema + infrastructure in one graph.
item.category: AI代理, skills, 开发者工具, DevOps, 数据库, 可视化

item.title: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
item.description: 待翻译：Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

item.title: ossu/computer-science
item.description: 待翻译：🎓 Path to a free self-taught education in Computer Science!
